summary: Tested Team Chat delete/clear and Inbox SMS/Email toggle removal changes. Backend APIs (100% pass), Frontend UI verified.
critical_code_review_comments: MessageModeToggle component is still imported in inbox.tsx (line 31) but not used - can be removed as dead import
seed_data_creation: Test channels created/deleted during pytest run with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API endpoints for delete channel and clear history are working correctly. Frontend Team Chat uses Alert.alert for mobile action sheets which has limited web support (menu button visible but native alert may not render fully on web). Inbox SMS/Email toggle successfully removed from UI.

tests: Delete channel success - returns 200, deletes channel and messages
Delete without user_id - returns 422 validation error
Clear history success - returns 200, messages cleared, channel preserved
Clear without user_id - returns 422 validation error

inbox_sms_email_toggle.details: MessageModeToggle component no longer rendered in Inbox header. Search and compose buttons still working.

details: Three-dot menu visible in chat header
Long-press on channels calls showChannelActions (code verified)
deleteChannel and clearHistory functions properly implemented
Menu options: Clear History, Delete Channel, Cancel
